content:
🔥 Canban | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: A personal productivity tool for managing tasks and projects locally within a web browser, prioritizing speed, privacy, and a modern user interface.
✨ Key Features: • Local-First Architecture (Zero backend, offline capability, data privacy) • Glassmorphism UI (Sleek, translucent, blurred, layered design) • Hardware Accelerated Drag & Drop • Advanced Theming Engine (Automatic Light/Dark mode detection) • Internationalization (i18n) for multiple languages
📖 Summary: Canban is a hyper-optimized, visually stunning, and privacy-focused local Kanban board application. It runs entirely in the browser with no backend or database, storing data locally using `localStorage` and featuring a premium Glassmorphism UI with advanced theming and internationalization.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
